alkylation reagent: alkylated with iodoacetamide (50 mM for 30 min)
alkylation concentration: alkylated with iodoacetamide (50 mM for 30 min)
cleavage agent: digested by Lys-C at a 1:100 enzyme/protein ratio
labeling: labeled with the corresponding tandem mass tag (TMT) reagent
reduction reagent: reduced with dithiothreitol (2 mM for 10 min)
reduction concentration: reduced with dithiothreitol (2 mM for 10 min)
